title: Family Needs a Hand
scenario: Your parents ask for ₹8,000 a month to help at home. You want to help, but it's a real chunk of your salary. How do you handle it?

choices.label: Send it and figure out the rest later
choices.lesson: Supporting family is valid and important — but treat it as a planned monthly commitment, not an afterthought, so the rest of your budget still works.

choices.label: Help, but plan the amount into your budget
choices.lesson: Helping sustainably means budgeting a number you can actually keep up, and still protecting your own safety net so you don't become dependent later.
